calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brent Kato appeared by zoom for Institute on Aging (Successor Trustee).
Carrie Moulton of Institute on Aging appeared by zoom.

The Court asked Mr. Kato if he talked with the Settlor about deleting two of the beneficiaries. Ms. Moulton stated that she didn't even notice it. that she met with the Settlor a few weeks before the Settlor passed away, that she did not take a close look at the document at the time and that she did not notice the changes until after the Settlor passed away. The Court noted that notice has been given to all of the charities. Mr. Kato stated that no objections have been received. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
